---
title: "Down the Rabbit Hole"
---

Hi, I'm YueLynn — a data analyst with a habit of diving too deep into things I find interesting.

This is my portfolio. Every few weeks I pick a topic, find the data, and see what it actually says. The topics are random. The analysis isn't.

Take a look around.

```{=html}
<iframe src="portfolio-tracker.html" width="100%" height="600px" frameborder="0" style="border:none;"></iframe>
```
